steps: %s %s 1. Relative to E. coli SSU rRNA gene 2. The probe must be dual-labelled either with 5’-6-FAM, 3’-BHQ1 or any other valid combination

%s %s Reagent Final conc. 1 tube (20μl) plate (20μl x 100) PCR H2O 4.6 460 iQTM Supermix 1x 10 1000 MgCl2 (25mM) 4.0 mM 0.8* 80* BSA (20μg/μl) 0.2 μg/μl 0.2 20 338F (10μM) 0.5 μM 1.0 100 805R (10μM) 0.5 μM 1.0 100 516P (10μM)† 0.2 μM 0.4 40 Template 2 2 x 100 TaqMan™ Fast Advanced Master Mix Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4444556
